product: Mission Critical add-on is now in Public Preview
tagline: The Mission Critical workspace add on is now in Public Preview.
what_it_does: The Mission Critical workspace add on is now in Public Preview. The add on unlocks managed disaster recovery and the existing Enhanced Security and Compliance (ESC) capabilities for a single compute rate, and is enabled per workspace from the new Add ons tab in the account console. Access to the Mission Critical add on is gated.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
key_takeaway: The Mission Critical workspace add on is now in Public Preview.
